title: One Enchant
body:
###  **The mod is made to order and is unlikely to be updated.**

**This mod limits the enchantments of items, now there can only be 1 enchantment.**

To replace the enchantment on an item, you need to place the same item with a different enchantment on the anvil.

You can also remove the enchantment using the "Grindstone" block and apply an enchantment book.

**NO** item **ALLOWED** + Enchantment book _(won't fix)_

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
